items.title: Research across 1,372 participants and 9K+ trials details "cognitive surrender", where most subjects had minimal AI skepticism and accepted faulty AI reasoning (Kyle Orland/Ars Technica)
items.title_original: Research across 1,372 participants and 9K+ trials details "cognitive surrender", where most subjects had minimal AI skepticism and accepted faulty AI reasoning (Kyle Orland/Ars Technica)
items.title_en: Research across 1,372 participants and 9K+ trials details "cognitive surrender", where most subjects had minimal AI skepticism and accepted faulty AI reasoning (Kyle Orland/Ars Technica)
items.title_zh: 对 1,372 名参与者和 9K+ 试验进行的研究详细介绍了“认知投降”，其中大多数受试者对 AI 持最低限度的怀疑并接受错误的 AI 推理（Kyle Orland/Ars Technica）
items.title_bilingual: 对 1,372 名参与者和 9K+ 试验进行的研究详细介绍了“认知投降”，其中大多数受试者对 AI 持最低限度的怀疑并接受错误的 AI 推理（Kyle Orland/Ars Technica） / Research across 1,372 participants and 9K+ trials details "cognitive surrender", where most subjects had minimal AI skepticism and accepted faulty AI reasoning (Kyle Orland/Ars Technica)

items.title: When I became a dad, I experienced postpartum depression. My whole life changed, and I no longer understood who I was.
items.title_original: When I became a dad, I experienced postpartum depression. My whole life changed, and I no longer understood who I was.
items.title_en: When I became a dad, I experienced postpartum depression. My whole life changed, and I no longer understood who I was.
items.title_zh: 当我成为父亲后，我经历了产后抑郁症。我的整个生活都变了，我不再明白自己是谁。
